assertions.assertion: Program.cs registers CustomClaimsPrincipalFactory as IUserClaimsPrincipalFactory<ApplicationUser> BEFORE calling AddAspNetIdentity
assertions.rationale: Registers via AddClaimsPrincipalFactory<>() on AddIdentity, which is before AddAspNetIdentity

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddAspNetIdentity<ApplicationUser>() which will wrap and call through to the custom factory
A CustomProfileService class inherits from ProfileService<ApplicationUser> and overrides IsUserActiveAsync
assertions.rationale: CustomProfileService implements IProfileService directly instead of inheriting from ProfileService<ApplicationUser>; overrides IsActiveAsync not IsUserActiveAsync

assertions.assertion: The IsUserActiveAsync override checks a property on the user (e.g., user.IsEnabled or user.IsActive) to determine if the user is active
assertions.rationale: Uses IsActiveAsync (not IsUserActiveAsync) and implements the full IProfileService instead of the simpler override pattern

assertions.assertion: The CustomProfileService is registered in DI as the IProfileService implementation
